title: bupleurum ranunculoides subsp. orbiculatum
intro: Bupleurum ranunculoides subsp. orbiculatum, also known as Chinese yellow thorn or variegated bupleurum, is a plant species within the family Apiaceae, characterized by its unique, variegated leaves and small yellow flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Bupleurum ranunculoides subsp. orbiculatum include its potential to lower fever, alleviate joint pain, and reduce stress and anxiety, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. Bupleurum ranunculoides subsp. orbiculatum can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
